text: Standing between these two scenes, I feel an odd sense of transition—from the strict, ordered world of the sterile conference room with its bright screens and empty chairs, into the vibrant and creative energy of the research and development exhibition. The contrast reminds me how spaces can shape mood and thought: one provokes order and deliberation, the other inspires curiosity and invention. I am both an observer and a participant, pulled by the tension between structure and possibility.
